items.title: Launch copy draft
items.summary: Draft CTA and offer framing for the pricing release.
items.body: Rewrite the CTA before launch day. Keep the offer framing tight and founder-readable.

items.title: Acme transcript
items.summary: Customer calls objections about rollout and pricing risk.
items.body: They worried about rollout risk, annual contract friction, and onboarding drag.

items.title: Pricing risk memo
items.summary: Customer objections collected for launch planning.
items.body: Pricing risk, customer objections, launch review, and support notes for the release.

items.title: Primary failover checklist
items.summary: Steps for worker recovery after Redis or Postgres trouble.
items.body: Verify Redis health, restart workers, and confirm queue drain after cluster failover. Check stale sync source warnings during worker recovery.

items.title: Board update memo
items.summary: Founder note about trust language and retrieval quality for the April board update.
items.body: Keep the board update direct. Mention support feedback and metrics, but avoid pricing launch CTA language.

items.title: Competitor trust analysis
items.summary: Market research on competitor positioning, trust claims, and evidence gaps.
items.body: Compare competitor trust language with pricing launch messaging and support promises.

items.title: Tenant shared memory contract
items.summary: Machine contract for scoped retrieval, tenant_shared fallback, and source item auditing.
items.body: Use POST memory retrieve for scoped retrieval with source_item_id audit metadata and fallback trace output.

items.title: Source freshness dashboard capture
items.summary: Screenshot capture showing stale sync source status and missing artifact previews in the operator dashboard.
items.body: The capture records the operator control tower state after a source fell behind.

queries.query: Where is the pricing launch CTA copy?
Where are the customer calls objections about pricing risk?
Which notes cover cluster failover and worker recovery?
Where is the founder board note about trust language?
Which market research memo covers competitor evidence gaps?
Find the tenant_shared fallback contract for scoped retrieval audit metadata.
Which screenshot shows stale sync source warnings in the operator dashboard?
